title: Point Cloud section — Open Folder button (desktop) or dropdown (browser)
capture_instructions: Close-up / zoomed view of the Point Cloud section at the top of the Settings tab. In desktop mode: show the 'Open Folder' button. In browser mode: show the dropdown selector (unpopulated or showing placeholder text). No point cloud loaded.
ui_state: Settings tab active, Point Cloud section visible at top of sidebar, no point cloud selected

annotations.label: Click to open folder picker or dropdown
